src/main/java/com/github/rawsanj/SpringR.general_idea: Consolidate multiple Spring Boot annotations into a single @SpringBootApplication with proxyBeanMethods=false to align with Spring Boot 3.x best practices and reduce boilerplate.
Remove imports for classes that are no longer referenced in the main application class after refactoring configuration and bean definitions.
src/main/java/com/github/rawsanj/SpringR.human_impl: Removed imports for ApplicationProperties, EnableConfigurationProperties, Bean, EnableAsync, and RestTemplate

src/main/java/com/github/rawsanj/config/.general_idea: Replace blocking Redis operations with reactive counterparts to align with Spring WebFlux and Java 17 modernization.
Explicitly configure Lettuce as the Redis client, which is the default for reactive Redis in Spring Boot 3.
Remove legacy blocking Redis message listener container and adapters.
Initialize reactive Redis subscriptions on application startup using ApplicationRunner.
Update atomic counter beans to use correct types and constant keys.
src/main/java/com/github/rawsanj/config/.human_impl: Changed `RedisAtomicInteger` initialization to use `MESSAGE_COUNTER_KEY` constant and added `RedisAtomicLong` for active users.

src/main/java/com/github/rawsanj/config/.general_idea: Restrict Redis configuration to non-Heroku profiles to handle environment-specific setups.
Optimize Spring configuration proxying for better performance.
Integrate Lombok for simplified logging setup.
src/main/java/com/github/rawsanj/config/.human_impl: Added `@Slf4j` annotation and used `log` in the ApplicationRunner.

src/main/java/com/github/rawsanj/model/C.general_idea: Replace manual boilerplate getters, setters, constructors, and toString with Lombok annotations to reduce code verbosity.
Implement the Serializable interface to allow the object to be serialized, likely for session or cache storage.
Configure Jackson to detect fields directly regardless of visibility, ensuring correct serialization behavior.
Add a new field to track the number of users currently online in the chat message model.

pom.xml.general_idea: Upgrade Spring Boot parent POM from 2.3.0 to 3.0.1 to align with Java 17 and Spring Boot 3.x ecosystem.
Update the target Java version property from 11 to 17 to enforce compilation against Java 17.
Replace the synchronous Spring Web starter with the reactive WebFlux starter to support non-blocking I/O.
Replace the synchronous Redis data starter with the reactive Redis starter to align with the WebFlux stack.
Remove the traditional Spring WebSocket starter as it is incompatible with the pure reactive WebFlux stack.
Remove WebJars dependencies (SockJS, STOMP, jQuery) which were used for the legacy synchronous WebSocket client setup.
Remove Spring Boot DevTools dependency, likely due to compatibility issues or lack of need in the new reactive/native setup.
Add Reactor Test dependency to enable testing of reactive streams and publishers.
Add Testcontainers JUnit Jupiter integration to allow spinning up Redis instances for integration tests.
Import the Testcontainers BOM to manage versions of test container dependencies consistently.
Update the Spring Boot Maven plugin configuration to use the new <image> tag structure for building Docker images.
Add AOT (Ahead-of-Time) processing execution to the build plugin to support GraalVM native image generation.
Define a Maven profile for native image builds, including the GraalVM native-maven-plugin.

README.md.general_idea: Update the project title and description to reflect the migration to Spring Boot 3.x, Java 17, and WebFlux.
README.md.human_impl: Changed title to 'Multi-instance Reactive Chat App using Spring Boot WebFlux and Redis Pub/Sub' and updated description to mention Java 17 and Spring Boot 3.x.

README.md.general_idea: Add documentation sections explaining how to build and run the application as a GraalVM Native Image.
README.md.human_impl: Added 'Pre-requisite for Graal Native Image' and 'Build Graal Native Image of the application' sections with instructions for SDKMAN and Maven profiles.

README.md.general_idea: Update the Redis Docker image version in the installation instructions to a newer stable release.
README.md.human_impl: Changed `bitnami/redis:4.0.11-r6` to `bitnami/redis:6.0.9` in the docker run command.

README.md.general_idea: Update Docker run commands to specify explicit image tags for both JVM and Native variants.
Add documentation links for new technologies introduced in the migration, specifically Graal Native Image and Testcontainers.
README.md.human_impl: Added entries for [Graal Native Image] and [Testcontainers] in the Tech section and reference links.

README.md.general_idea: Update the copyright year in the README to reflect the current year of the migration.
README.md.human_impl: Changed 'Copyright (c) 2020 Sanjay Rawat' to 'Copyright (c) 2021 Sanjay Rawat'.

README.md.general_idea: Add status badges for Heroku and DockerHub CI workflows to the README header.
README.md.human_impl: Added markdown badges for 'Deploy to Heroku' and 'DockerHub' workflows.

README.md.general_idea: Add a 'Deploy to Heroku' button to facilitate one-click deployment.
README.md.human_impl: Added Heroku deploy button image and link.

README.md.general_idea: Provide links to older branches for users who need to reference previous Java/Spring Boot versions.
README.md.human_impl: Added blockquote section with links to Spring Boot 2.3, 1.5, 2.4.6, and 2.5.2 branches.

README.md.general_idea: Clean up markdown reference link definitions by removing trailing slashes and standardizing format.
README.md.human_impl: Removed trailing slashes from URLs in the reference link definitions at the bottom of the file.

mvnw.general_idea: Replace the Maven wrapper shell script with a newer version that includes automatic JAR downloading capabilities.
mvnw.human_impl: Replaced entire mvnw content with version supporting auto-download of maven-wrapper.jar

mvnw.cmd.general_idea: Replace static wrapper invocation with dynamic property-based download and PowerShell fallback to ensure the wrapper JAR is available.
mvnw.cmd.human_impl: Added logic to read 'wrapperUrl' from maven-wrapper.properties and use PowerShell to download the JAR if missing.

mvnw.cmd.general_idea: Update the Apache License URL in the header comments from http to https.
Set the command window title to the script name for better identification.
mvnw.cmd.human_impl: Added 'title %0' at the start of the script.

src/main/docker/docker-compose.yml.general_idea: Upgrade the Redis container image from version 4 to version 6 to align with newer infrastructure requirements.
Correct the Redis data volume mount path to match the directory structure of the updated Bitnami Redis image.
Switch the application container images to the GraalVM native image variant corresponding to the new Spring Boot version.
Explicitly define the dependency on the Redis service for the application containers to ensure correct startup order.

src/main/k8s/configMap.yaml.general_idea: Removed unused WebSocket topic configuration properties from the Kubernetes ConfigMap during the migration to Spring Boot 3.x.
src/main/k8s/configMap.yaml.human_impl: Deleted lines defining RAW_TOPIC_MESSAGE and RAW_TOPIC_COUNT

src/main/k8s/deployment.yaml.general_idea: Update the Kubernetes deployment to use the new Docker image tag corresponding to the Spring Boot 3.x and Java 17 migration.
Increase CPU limits and requests in the Kubernetes deployment to accommodate the resource requirements of the updated application.

src/main/resources/static/app.js.general_idea: Extract jQuery selectors into variables to reduce DOM lookup duplication and improve code readability.
Replace the SockJS/STOMP client with the native WebSocket API to remove external library dependencies.
Adapt message handling logic to parse JSON payloads directly from WebSocket events instead of STOMP frames.
Implement visual feedback functions for user connection and disconnection events.
Add functionality to display the number of currently online users in the UI.
Update JavaScript variable declarations and comparison operators to modern standards (let/const and ===).

src/main/resources/static/index.html.general_idea: Added lang attribute to html tag for accessibility compliance.
Replaced local WebJars script references with CDN links to reduce build size or simplify dependencies.
Added HTML elements to display connection status alerts and online user count.
Updated the application header title to reflect the migration to Reactive Redis and Native image support.
Adjusted Bootstrap column classes to accommodate new UI elements like the online user counter.
